== Notes for [[Item:Q107029|Q107029]] ==

'''Historic Profile needs to be verified for existence and accuracy.'''

Previous Link to '''[http://www.geni.com/people/Ghaus-e-Azam-Mohiyuddin-Abdul-Qadir-al-Jilani-bin-Abu-Saleh-Musa/6000000007609639632/ Sayyid Shaikh Abdul Qadir al-Jilani bin Abu Saleh Musa] (1077-1166 AD) of Baghdad, Iraq''' has been edited due to paternal lineage being different. Correct ancestry from several sources is reported as noted below from his Master Profile on GENI, and supported with article on '''[http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdul-Qadir_Gilani/ Wikipedia]'''.

'''Ancestry From Father:'''

'''[http://www.geni.com/people/Ghaus-e-Azam-Mohiyuddin-Abdul-Qadir-al-Jilani-bin-Abu-Saleh-Musa/6000000007609639632/ Abdul Qadir al-Jilani]''' son of Abu Salih Musa son of Abi Abdullah son of Yahya Zahid son of Muhammad son of Dawud son of Musa Sani son of [http://www.geni.com/people/Abdullah-al-Saleh-at-Thaani-bin-Musa-al-Jaun/6000000001472147299/ Abdullah Sani] son of [http://www.geni.com/people/Musa-al-Jaun-bin-Abdullah-al-Kaamil-5/6000000007825337302/ Musa al-Jaun] son of [http://www.geni.com/people/Sayyidi-Abdullah-al-Mahdi-al-Kaamil-bin-Hasan-al-Muthanna-4/6000000000163032628/ Abdullah al-Mahaz] son of Hasan Musanna son of Hasan ibn Ali.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000012774300832

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]]
== Merged content ==
Testing the merge capacities[[Category:Pages]]
